name: ECS Services Restrict Public Ports
description: ECS services should restrict public ports to only 80 and 443, minimizing attack surface from unnecessary exposed ports
remediation: Modify ECS service security groups to only allow inbound traffic on ports 80 and 443 from the internet
remediation_steps: Identify the security groups attached to the ECS service's network configuration
Review inbound rules for ports other than 80/443 that allow 0.0.0.0/0
Remove or modify rules to restrict access to only necessary ports
For internal services, ensure they are not publicly accessible
